mapper.update: UPDATE LOGIN_HISTORY SET FN_TIME = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE USER_ID=#{userId} AND ST_TIME = ( SELECT ST_TIME FROM LOGIN_HISTORY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ST_TIME > DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AND FN_TIME IS NULL ORDER BY ST_TIME DESC LIMIT 1 )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.* ,B.USER_NAME ,C.AREA_NAME AS REGION_NAME ,ROUND( TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, A.ST_TIME, A.FN_TIME) / 60 ) AS USE_TIME FROM LOGIN_HISTORY A LEFT JOIN SYS_USER B ON A.USER_ID=B.USER_ID LEFT JOIN CODE_AREACODE C ON B.REGION_ID=C.AREA_CODE WHERE 1=1
AND B.REGION_ID=#{regionId}
AND B.AUTH_CODE=#{authCode}
AND B.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND B.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND A.ST_TIME BETWEEN #{sDate} AND DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{eDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND A.ST_TIME > DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY A.ST_TIME DESC
